title: BRUBAKER 20 Pack Tree Candles - Pyramid Christmas Tree Candles - Red
features: 🌍 Made in Europe - these festive tree candles are of the highest quality. Thoroughly coloured, the candles burn particularly clean, smoke-free and odourless. They have a long burning time of 1.5 hours

🎄🎂 Versatile - perfect for Christmas decorations and on the Christmas tree, the candles can even be used on birthday parties and cakes or as party lighting. Even on a romantic evening, these candles create an atmospheric atmosphere
🎅🏻 Traditional Christmas decorations - candles spread a contemplative mood in your home. They radiate peace and happiness and are a must for every traditional Christmas with your family
🎁 Small gift idea - the lovingly designed window box protects the candles from damage and ensures a beautiful presentation - a great gift for friends and family for any occasion

🕯️ Dimensions - height: 3.75 inches (9.5 cm), diameter: 0.5 inches (1.25 cm). The candles are designed to match your angel games, pyramids or candle arches. Nevertheless, please check the size of your candle holder to make sure that they match
description: Product Description BRUBAKER Wax Tree Candles These beautiful wax candles are discreet and versatile. With their pleasant and atmospheric light, they can be used for many occasions. If you want to give these decorative tree candles as a gift, you don't need any extra gift packaging. In the artfully designed window box, our candles are perfectly protected from damage and are a wonderful gift for your loved ones. Highest Quality The BRUBAKER tree candles have been manufactured to the highest quality. Evenly coloured on the outside, the candles burn particularly cleanly, smoke-free and odourless. They have a long burning time of 1.5 hours. Clean and smoke-free burning Long burning time: 1.5 h Odourless Made in the EU Versatile Use due to Ideal Candle Size The candles are designed to fit standard angel games, pyramids or candle arches or even tree candle holders. Nevertheless, please check the size of your candle holder to make sure they match. Dimensions: 3.74 inches high 0.49 inches diameter Examples of Usage For Birthdays Whether as festive party decorations or as classic candles for the birthday cake, these colourful candles are the ideal size and, with their outstanding quality, the right choice for special occasions in your home. For Romantic Moments What could be more romantic than time for two at home by romantic candlelight? Perfect for an evening at the dining table or on the couch. With the matching holder, it is also an atmospheric highlight for the bathroom. For Christmas Trees Our candles are ideally suited as tree lighting and make your Christmas tree shine. You can purchase matching tree candle holders from us. For Christmas Pyramids and more With a diameter of 0.49 inches, our candles are the perfect size for your Christmas pyramids, Christmas decorations, angel scenes or candle arches. Our Candles in a Wide Range of Colours Available in the Following Colours: Light gold (metallic), champagne, dark red, lilac (metallic), gold, rose (metallic), rose gold (metallic), red, silver, turquoise (metallic), white and honey yellow (beeswax based).
